title: Supply Chain Manager - Om Logistics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Om Logistics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
